title: Hermes Steer Thread Model
brief: Hermes 用 Python 写的线程模型信息图,展示 steer 的进程内注入。左侧 Gateway 或 CLI 线程调用 agent.steer(text);中间一个共享槽 _pending_steer 受 threading.Lock 保护,多次 steer 换行累加;右侧 Agent 执行线程在多个 drain 点 pre-API、per-tool、per-batch、final 取走 pending,并通过 apply_pending_steer_to_tool_results 追加到最后一条 tool result。强调 单进程加锁,以及 为保 prompt cache 与 role 交替而改写已有 tool result 而不是插新消息。清晰科技配色,模块清晰箭头,中英文简洁标签。
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Hermes Steer Thread Model'. Diagram type: article illustration. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
Hermes 用 Python 写的线程模型信息图,展示 steer 的进程内注入。左侧 Gateway 或 CLI 线程调用 agent.steer(text);中间一个共享槽 _pending_steer 受 threading.Lock 保护,多次 steer 换行累加;右侧 Agent 执行线程在多个 drain 点 pre-API、per-tool、per-batch、final 取走 pending,并通过 apply_pending_steer_to_tool_results 追加到最后一条 tool result。强调 单进程加锁,以及 为保 prompt cache 与 role 交替而改写已有 tool result 而不是插新消息。清晰科技配色,模块清晰箭头,中英文简洁标签。
